headline: A goodbye whispered through clenched teeth, too proud to cry.
mood_description: Low strings crawl under a half sung vocal. Everything feels held in.
interpretation: Love ended and nobody wants to say it out loud. The silence between them does all the talking, and each line lands like a door clicking shut in a dark hallway.

themes.name: quiet endings
themes.description: The relationship dies in a whisper, not a fight.

themes.name: held pride
themes.description: Neither party will admit they're hurting.

journey.description: A kitchen at midnight. One voice, one cup of coffee, one chair pulled out for no one.
A refrain that almost breaks, then doesn't. Words swallowed mid sentence.
The other person is remembered in past tense. Only the room answers back.
Three notes on a piano. Then nothing.

key_lines.insight: Small possessions outlast the people who owned them.
A tiny detail does the work a whole paragraph of grief couldn't.
A lie told so carefully that both parties know exactly what it means.

sonic_texture: Piano, low strings, a single breath between verses. No drums. Space does most of the work.
